title: Icy Serrano Mediterranean Ham Ramekin
description: A refreshing Mediterranean-inspired dish featuring Serrano ham and a crunchy crust, perfect for a weekend brunch or a hangover-cure.
instructions: Rinse and dry the Serrano ham, then chop it into small pieces.
In a medium bowl, combine the chopped Serrano ham, artichoke hearts, olives, feta cheese, and parsley.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Add the lemon juice mixture to the Serrano ham mixture and stir until combined.
Add the dum to the bowl and stir until the dum is evenly coated with the Serrano ham mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a 6-oz ramekin and bake for 8 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove the ramekin from the oven and let it cool for 2 minutes.
Serve the Icy Serrano Mediterranean Ham Ramekin warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Refrigerate leftovers for up to 3 days.
